text.message: Purple, you do have the best set up and army lol
You don’t think you’re ahead of me?
doesn't do much when im not actionable
I guess army doesn’t mean anything
I mean I have to trade for everything
not when you will just lose it later
No one else has any knights
blue i know you have brick
not a good shot to grab it
So you don’t think you’re in the lead purple?
you're more flexible and better production
I don’t produce brick or wheat
I’d be honest if I thought I was ahead of you
why do you have to conditionalize that statement?
Well you’re entitled to your opinion
its not like army is locked this early
I mean I think there’s a 99% chance you end with army
Really? Want to make a bet lol
im actually looking up the stats now
Stats of what? You holding army?
Let me run it through my state of the art model
yea, starting with army before you settle
the discords have way more stats than colonist has
There’s a stat for if you have army before a settle and hold until end of game?
with how the game ls looking rn
its not hard to figure out if you have the data for it
What discord? Colonist? I’d be interested in how that since that’s interesting
Yeah I’d put blue ahead of you
like i said im not likely to hold army
red is going to lose to blue and he doesn't realize it
Idk how blue didn’t rob red right there
red is just trolling at this point
mold you were in major league catan earlier in the year, right? Or just one of the leagues? Your name is familiar
Im a finalist in this season of KOC PL's league
i've been to the major tournys and nats
How do you join? Just through the discord and googling? Never heard of it
gg got lucky with the dev pulls
colonist ranked is just a joke
